---
title: "Contact Us"
description: "Get in touch with chen.ist. Book a consultation, send us an email, or visit our offices in Craiova and Bucharest, Romania."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .ap { --c: #81BD4A; --g: #86868b; font-family: 'Open Sans', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; }
        .ap-hero { padding: 12rem 0 8rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.06; }
        .ap-hero .gr { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 500px; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; line-height: 1.45; }
        .ap-hero a { color: var(--c); text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-hero a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-s { padding: 7rem 0; }
        .ap-bg { padding: 7rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-bg { background: #161617; }
        .ap h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ap .sub { text-align: center; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 5rem; }
        .ap-t { text-align: center; padding: 0 0.75rem; }
        .ap-t i { font-size: 1.75rem; color: var(--c); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.85; }
        .ap-t h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
        .ap-t p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; }
        .ap-lk { color: var(--c); font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-lk:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-lk::after { content: " ›"; font-weight: 300; }
        .ap-r { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 4rem; }
        .ap-r.rv { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .ap-ri { flex: 1 1 0; min-width: 0; }
        .ap-ri img { width: 100%; border-radius: 28px; }
        .ap-rt h2 { text-align: left; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3.5vw, 2.75rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-rt p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.65; }
        .ap-rt .lk { margin-top: 1.75rem; }
        .ap-n { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 6rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .ap-nn { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--c); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }
        .ap-nl { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--g); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-top: 0.35rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta { padding: 10rem 0; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; line-height: 1.5; }
        .ap-b { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; }
        .ap-b:hover { background: #6BA33A; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-sm { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--g); margin-top: 1.75rem; }
        .ap-sm i { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-d { width: 36px; height: 3px; background: var(--c); margin: 0 auto 3.5rem; border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0.6; }
        .ap-contact-info h3 { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
        .ap-contact-info p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
        .ap-contact-info a { color: var(--c); text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-contact-info a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-contact-info .ci { margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
        .ap-contact-info .ci i { color: var(--c); font-size: 1.25rem; margin-right: 0.5rem; vertical-align: -2px; }
        .ap-form label { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; display: block; }
        .ap-form input, .ap-form textarea, .ap-form select { width: 100%; padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem; border: 1px solid #d2d2d7; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.95rem; font-family: inherit; background: transparent; color: inherit; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
        .ap-form input:focus, .ap-form textarea:focus, .ap-form select:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--c); }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-form input, [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-form textarea, [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-form select { border-color: #424245; }
        .ap-form .fg { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
        .ap-form .fr { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.25rem; }
        .ap-form .fc { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--g); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        .ap-form .fc input { width: auto; }
        .ap-form .fc a { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-form button { width: 100%; padding: 0.85rem; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; }
        .ap-form button:hover { background: #6BA33A; }
        .ap-social a { display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #d2d2d7; border-radius: 980px; font-size: 0.88rem; color: inherit; text-decoration: none; margin: 0.25rem; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
        .ap-social a:hover { border-color: var(--c); color: var(--c); text-decoration: none; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-social a { border-color: #424245; }
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .ap-hero { padding: 7rem 0 5rem; }
          .ap-r, .ap-r.rv { flex-direction: column; gap: 3rem; }
          .ap-ri { flex: none; }
          .ap-rt h2 { text-align: center; }
          .ap-n { gap: 3rem; }
          .ap-cta { padding: 6rem 0; }
          .ap-form .fr { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ap">

<div class="ap-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Get in <span class="gr">Touch</span></h1>
    <p>Questions, projects, or just a conversation — reach us at <a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-r">
      <div class="ap-ri ap-contact-info">
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
          <h3>Email</h3>
          <p><a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a> — General inquiries</p>
          <p><a href="mailto:support@chen.ist">support@chen.ist</a> — Support</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Headquarters</h3>
          <p>Str. Filantropiei, 1-3, 200143<br>Craiova, Romania</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Partners Office</h3>
          <p>Bucharest, Romania<br><a href="mailto:bucharest@chen.ist">bucharest@chen.ist</a></p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci ap-social">
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ap-ri ap-form">
        <h2 style="text-align:left;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2rem);margin-bottom:2rem;">Send a message</h2>
        <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Full Name *</label>
              <input type="text" name="name" required placeholder="Your full name">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Email *</label>
              <input type="email" name="email" required placeholder="your@email.com">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Phone</label>
              <input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="Phone number">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Company</label>
              <input type="text" name="company" placeholder="Company (optional)">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Interest *</label>
            <select name="interest" required>
              <option value="">Select...</option>
              <optgroup label="Services">
                <option value="digital-infrastructure">Digital Infrastructure</option>
                <option value="cybersecurity">Cybersecurity</option>
                <option value="nis2">NIS2 Compliance</option>
                <option value="cloud">Cloud Services</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Academy">
                <option value="course">Course Enrollment</option>
                <option value="training">Training Registration</option>
                <option value="event">Event / Hackathon</option>
                <option value="webinar">Webinar</option>
                <option value="summer-school">Summer School</option>
              </optgroup>
              <option value="general">General Inquiry</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Message *</label>
            <textarea name="message" rows="4" required placeholder="How can we help you?"></textarea>
          </div>
          <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="New Contact from chen.ist">
          <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="contact-page">
          <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
          <div class="fc">
            <input type="checkbox" required>
            <span>I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> *</span>
          </div>
          <button type="submit"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Send Message</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-d"></div>
    <h2>Prefer a live<br>conversation?</h2>
    <p>Book directly in our calendar. 30 minutes, no strings attached.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-b">Book on Cal.com</a>
    <div class="ap-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> EU & International
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
